title: Arbitrage via different prices returned by Oracle
description_excerpt: Arbitrage can be conducted using different prices returned by the Oracle for the same asset at different query points

title: LP can instantly arbitrage and drain Maker via Pyth price update
description_excerpt: LP can instantly arbitrage and drain any Maker by updating the Pyth price within the same transaction

title: Attackers can lock market funds and steal maker funds
description_excerpt: Attackers can lock market funds prevent normal execution of transactions and steal funds from the maker contract

title: Liquidity provider can grief LP rewards
description_excerpt: A liquidity provider can grief other LP users rewards by manipulating the reward distribution mechanism

title: Hacker can steal fee from LPs
description_excerpt: Hacker can steal accumulated fees from liquidity providers by exploiting fee collection vulnerability

title: User Can Self-Revoke BLACKLISTED_ROLE
description_excerpt: Users can call renounceRole to remove their own BLACKLISTED_ROLE bypassing the blacklist access control mechanism

title: BLACKLISTED_ROLE can be renounced by anyone
description_excerpt: BLACKLISTED_ROLE role can be renounced by the blacklisted user themselves due to inherited renounceRole from AccessControl

title: Blacklisted users bypass mTBILL ban via renounceRole
description_excerpt: MidasAccessControl allows blacklisted users to bypass mTBILL trading ban by renouncing the BLACKLISTED_ROLE

title: Malicious borrower extracts collateral through refinancing
description_excerpt: Malicious borrower can extract collateral through refinancing of loans with borrowed collateral causing lender fund loss
